  "basePath": "/",

    "/": {
      "get": {
        "description": "Server Testing",
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "description": "OK"
          }
        }
      }
    },
    "/user/register": {
      "post": {
        "description": "Employee/Manager/Admin",
        "parameters": [
          {
            "name": "body",
            "in": "body",
            "schema": {
              "type": "object",
              "properties": {
                "name": {
                  "example": "any"
                },
                "email": {
                  "example": "any"
                },
                "password": {
                  "example": "any"
                },
                "role": {
                  "example": "any"
                }
              }
            }
          }
        ],
        "responses": {
          "201": {
            "description": "Created"
          },
          "400": {
            "description": "Bad Request"
          },
          "500": {
            "description": "Internal Server Error"
          }
        }
      }
    },

      "post": {
        "description": "Employee/Manager/Admin",

            "in": "body",

              "type": "object",
              "properties": {
                "email": {

                "password": {

    "/employee/projects/": {
      "get": {
        "description": "Employee Route",
        "parameters": [
          {
            "name": "x-auth-token",
            "in": "header",
            "type": "string"
          },
          {
            "name": "page",
            "in": "query",
            "type": "string"
          },
          {
            "name": "limit",
            "in": "query",
            "type": "string"
          },
          {
            "name": "name",
            "in": "query",
            "type": "string"
          },
          {
            "name": "assignedUser",
            "in": "query",
            "type": "string"
          }
        ],
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "description": "OK"
          },
          "400": {
            "description": "Bad Request"
          },
          "401": {
            "description": "Unauthorized"
          },
          "404": {
            "description": "Not Found"
          },
          "500": {
            "description": "Internal Server Error"
          }
        }
      }
    },
    "/employee/projects/{id}": {
      "get": {
        "description": "Get Single Employee Routes",
        "parameters": [
          {
            "name": "id",
            "in": "path",
            "required": true,
            "type": "string"
          },
          {
            "name": "x-auth-token",
            "in": "header",
            "type": "string"
          }
        ],
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "description": "OK"
          },
